query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A figure stands near horizontal striped bands against warm orange-amber tones, with dark horizontal curved shapes in the lower portion suggesting architectural elements or steps.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred image shows a faint human figure standing near horizontal striped bands, with extreme underexposure crushing the lower half into near-black darkness while warm orange-amber light streaks across the upper portion, creating an unsettling atmosphere of isolation and disorientation through deliberate blur and oppressive tonal extremes.
